languages.text: "Утверждение истинно. Иные способы приведения генетора Фебруса к согласию уже продемонстрировали свою неэффективность, сказавшись на производительности машинных отсеков".
"This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."
languages.original_text: "Утверждение истинно. Иные способы приведения генетора Фебруса к согласию уже продемонстрировали свою неэффективность, сказавшись на производительности машинных отсеков".

traits.locale_text: "The assertion is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs to compliance have already demonstrated their ineffectiveness, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

"The assertion is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs to compliance have already demonstrated their ineffectiveness, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."
"The assertion is correct. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."
"The assertion is correct. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

languages.text: «Esa declaración es verdadera. Los otros medios de hacer que el genetor Februs cumpla su cometido ya han demostrado ser ineficaces y han tenido un efecto negativo en la productividad de los compartimentos motores».
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: «Esa declaración es verdadera. Los otros medios de hacer que el genetor Februs cumpla su cometido ya han demostrado ser ineficaces y han tenido un efecto negativo en la productividad de los compartimentos motores».

languages.text: « Cette affirmation est exacte. D'autres moyens visant à mettre le genetor Februs en conformité se sont avérés inefficaces, car ils ont eu un effet néfaste sur la productivité des compartiments des moteurs. »
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: « Cette affirmation est exacte. D'autres moyens visant à mettre le genetor Februs en conformité se sont avérés inefficaces, car ils ont eu un effet néfaste sur la productivité des compartiments des moteurs. »

languages.text: “此陈述正确。其他迫使费布鲁斯基因士合规的手段均已证明无效，且对引擎舱的生产效率产生了负面影响。”
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: “此陈述正确。其他迫使费布鲁斯基因士合规的手段均已证明无效，且对引擎舱的生产效率产生了负面影响。”

languages.text: "Diese Aussage ist korrekt. Andere Versuche, Genetor Februs willfährig zu machen, haben sich bereits als ineffektiv erwiesen und hatten negative Auswirkungen auf die Produktivität der Maschinenmodule."
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Aussage ist korrekt. Andere Versuche, Genetor Februs willfährig zu machen, haben sich bereits als ineffektiv erwiesen und hatten negative Auswirkungen auf die Produktivität der Maschinenmodule."

languages.text: "Bu önerme doğru. Genetör Februs'u yola getirmenin diğer yollarının zaten etkisiz olduğu kanıtlandı. Bu durum, motor bölmelerinin verimliliğini olumsuz yönde etkiledi."
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: "Bu önerme doğru. Genetör Februs'u yola getirmenin diğer yollarının zaten etkisiz olduğu kanıtlandı. Bu durum, motor bölmelerinin verimliliğini olumsuz yönde etkiledi."

languages.text: 「その言明は真です。ゲネター・フェブラスを遵守させるためのほかの手段は、すでに無効であると判明しており、機関区画の生産性に悪影響を及ぼしました」
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Other means of bringing Genetor Februs into compliance have already proven ineffective, having had an adverse effect on the productivity of the engine compartments."

traits.locale_text: 「その言明は真です。ゲネター・フェブラスを遵守させるためのほかの手段は、すでに無効であると判明しており、機関区画の生産性に悪影響を及ぼしました」
